---
name: Optimization / Performance
about: Propose performance improvements or optimizations
title: "[OPTIMIZE] <area>: short summary"
labels: perf, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### Summary
Brief description of the optimization and target area (CPU, memory, latency, disk, network).

### Baseline
Current metrics or behavior (benchmarks, traces, or examples).

### Proposed approach
What will you change? Include algorithms, caching, batching, or architectural adjustments.

### Expected improvement
Quantifiable targets (e.g., % CPU reduction, latency lowered to X ms).

### Testing & benchmarks
How to reproduce baseline and validate improvement. Include commands or scripts.

### Risks & rollbacks
Potential regressions and how to revert if needed.

### Additional notes
Any implementation notes or references.
